translated: [CORNER: Story Watchalong] I've picked out a few scenes I personally want to talk about,
I was actually a bit selfish today—
the staff are shaking their heads at me saying I was selfish, but...
I really had a hard time choosing.
I felt like saying, "Let's just watch episodes 1 through 8 together!"
But for now, we're going to take a look at episodes 7 and 8.
Since this is AfterTalk, I'm going to be doing a lot of talking.
I'll be chatting quite a bit.
If I get too noisy for you,
I hope you'll bear with me!
